# ha-frontend 20260527.2 — LCARS Theme Impact Analysis

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Release tag | `20260527.2` |
| Type | Pre-release / Beta |
| Published | 2026-06-01T17:53:24Z |
| Analyzed | 2026-06-02T17:27:13Z |
| Changed files | 26 |

## Release Notes

- Fix missing location data in calendar (@karwosts - #52291)
- Add box-shadow transition to top app bar (@jpbede - #52292)
- Ignore location in description (@silamon - #52297)
- Fix untracked legend in detail graph card (@karwosts - #52299)
- Fix behavior for move view left/right (@karwosts - #52300)
- Use right token for topbar shadow transition (@jpbede - #52306)
- Show all counter actions if none specified (@silamon - #52317)
- Fixed filter flex direction on mobile + removed unused classes (@dev-reedus - #52327)
- Respect backend order for floors and areas in entity tree (@piitaya - #52329)
- Fix picker default popover-placement (@wendevlin - #52336)
- App-Info: Hide app title on narrow (@wendevlin - #52337)
- Allow to set refresh url while dialog is open, use for matter device (@bramkragten - #52341)
- Fix vacuum and lawn mower features not showing default buttons (@piitaya - #52343)

---

## HIGH IMPACT

No high-impact breaking changes identified in this release. No CSS custom properties were renamed or removed, no web component element names changed, no shadow DOM structures were restructured, and no slots or parts were removed that the ha-lcars theme currently targets.

---

## MEDIUM IMPACT

### Component: `ha-top-app-bar-fixed`

**What changed:** `src/components/ha-top-app-bar-fixed.ts` adds `box-shadow` to the `transition` list on the top app bar's host element, using the existing token `--ha-animation-duration-normal`:

```css
transition:
  box-shadow var(--ha-animation-duration-normal) ease,
  width var(--ha-animation-duration-normal) ease,
  padding-left var(--ha-animation-duration-normal) ease,
  padding-right var(--ha-animation-duration-normal) ease;
```

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The LCARS theme sets `app-header-background-color` and `app-header-text-color` via CSS custom properties and injects extensive `div.header .toolbar` styles via `card-mod-root-yaml`. The toolbar uses `box-shadow` implicitly through HA's elevation system. The newly animated `box-shadow` transition means any scroll-triggered elevation change on the top app bar will now visually animate rather than snap. This is generally harmless, but if the LCARS theme is currently suppressing or overriding `box-shadow` on the toolbar (it does not appear to do so explicitly), a visible animated shadow flash could appear on page load or scroll.

**Affected LCARS rule:** `card-mod-root-yaml` → `div.header: | .toolbar { ... }` — the toolbar block does not currently set `box-shadow: none` or override the elevation token.

**Suggested fix:** If the animated box-shadow is visually undesirable (e.g., a shadow "fading in" over the LCARS elbow graphic), add `box-shadow: none !important;` to the `.toolbar` block in `card-mod-root-yaml`:

```yaml
div.header: |
  .toolbar {
    box-shadow: none !important;
    /* ... existing rules ... */
  }
```

This is a cosmetic concern only — no layout will break.

---

### Component: `hui-vacuum-commands-card-feature`

**What changed:** `src/panels/lovelace/card-features/hui-vacuum-commands-card-feature.ts` introduces a new exported constant `VACUUM_DEFAULT_COMMANDS`:

```ts
export const VACUUM_DEFAULT_COMMANDS: VacuumCommand[] = [
  "start_pause",
  "stop",
  "return_home",
];
```

The `getStubConfig()` method no longer pre-populates the `commands` array; instead, when `config.commands` is `undefined`, the feature now falls back to `VACUUM_DEFAULT_COMMANDS` at render time. This means existing vacuum command card features with no explicit `commands` key in their YAML will now render 3 buttons (`start_pause`, `stop`, `return_home`) rather than whatever the previous stub default was (previously it used the entity's supported features, up to 3).

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The `ha-control-button-group` rendered by this feature lives inside cards that may have LCARS `button-*` classes applied. If a user's vacuum card previously rendered 0 or 1 buttons (because the entity had limited features and `commands` was unset), it will now render up to 3 buttons, potentially changing the height or layout of an LCARS-styled card feature row.

**Affected LCARS rule:** `card-mod-card-yaml` button class rules targeting `ha-control-button-group` geometry (specifically `height: 100%`, `min-height: 60px`, `flex-direction`, etc. under `.button-small`, `.button-lozenge-*`, etc.).

**Suggested fix:** No CSS change required now, but users with LCARS-styled vacuum cards should verify their card feature rows still fit within their layout. If overflow occurs, add an explicit `commands:` list to the card feature YAML config.

---

### Component: `hui-lawn-mower-commands-card-feature`

**What changed:** Identical pattern to the vacuum change above. `getStubConfig()` no longer pre-populates `commands`; the feature now falls back to `LAWN_MOWER_COMMANDS` (all available commands) when `config.commands` is `undefined`, potentially rendering more buttons than before on existing unconfigured cards.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** Same concern as vacuum — `ha-control-button-group` height/layout within LCARS-styled cards.

**Affected LCARS rule:** Same button class rules in `card-mod-card-yaml`.

**Suggested fix:** Same as vacuum — verify layout, add explicit `commands:` to card feature YAML if needed.

---

## LOW IMPACT

### Component: `ha-icon-picker`

**What changed:** The `popover-placement="bottom-start"` attribute was removed from `ha-icon-picker`'s internal `ha-generic-picker`. The picker will now use the default popover placement (which `ha-generic-picker` defaults to a fixed value per `src/components/ha-generic-picker.ts`'s own fix in this same release, PR #52336).

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** The LCARS theme does not currently inject any CSS into `ha-icon-picker` or target its popover/dropdown positioning. No visual breakage expected.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed. Informational only — if a future LCARS update styled the icon picker dropdown, popover placement behavior would need to be re-evaluated.

---

### Component: `customizable-list-feature` (new file)

**What changed:** A new shared utility `src/panels/lovelace/editor/config-elements/customizable-list-feature.ts` was introduced. It is consumed by the vacuum, lawn mower, and counter actions card feature editors to generate a `customize` boolean toggle + a reorderable multi-select list in the card editor UI.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** This only affects the Lovelace card editor dialog UI (the "Edit card" panel). The LCARS theme targets `card-mod-dialog-yaml` with only a `font-family` injection and does not style card editor form elements in depth. The new boolean toggle and select list will render with default HA form styling.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed now. Optionally, if LCARS card editor form styling is added in the future, the new `ha-form` schema fields introduced here (selector type `boolean` + `select` with `mode: "list"`, `reorder: true`) could be styled.

---

### Component: `hui-card-picker` / `hui-badge-picker` / `dialog-new-dashboard`

**What changed:** Several Fuse.js search configurations gained `ignoreLocation: true` and/or `ignoreDiacritics: true`. These are pure search behavior changes with zero visual effect.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** Nothing. No CSS is targeted at these components.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed.

---

### Component: `hui-root` (view move left/right)

**What changed:** The `_moveViewLeft` and `_moveViewRight` methods now call `_selectView(newIndex)` instead of directly assigning `this._curView = newIndex`. This is a behavior/navigation fix.

**What it affects in ha-lcars:** No CSS rules in ha-lcars target the view-switching mechanism directly. The `hui-view`, `hui-masonry-view`, and `hui-panel-view` CSS rules in `card-mod-root-yaml` are unaffected.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed.

---
